fieldValues.value: LiMoMa — the Limehouse Museum of Maybe Art — is a community gallery initiative that uses the back stairs and landings of Limehouse Town Hall as a space for exhibiting artwork. It exists as a voluntary association of members with no formal legal status. The pilot runs for six months from June 2026.
The name and definition set the frame for all subsequent decisions. 'Maybe Art' signals that the space is exploratory — not a conventional gallery with commercial or institutional expectations.
Unanimous agreement of all current members.
